title: "Open Item Page" spacing off today
excerpt: Anybody else seeing the spacing really weird today when opening up an item?

posts.author: TheBox (Mark )
posts.cookedHtml:
Anybody else seeing the spacing really weird today when opening up an item?

Screenshot 2023-05-10 at 9.27.24 AM1088×1188 93.4 KB

posts.author: Cherring (Candace Herring)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I just submitted a question on this. It is making the item card function difficult to use.

posts.author: KMcG (Kelly McGarity)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

Glad to see I’m not the only one seeing this.
I also noticed that some of my file fields are not showing the files anymore, but they show on the board view.

Really strange… hope it’s fixed soon!

posts.author: SusanBucheger (Susan Bucheger)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here - submitted an issue, it makes the item card very hard to work from. Hope it is fixed very soon!

posts.author: agoulet (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! I’m so glad I’m not the only one. This is making item card view very confusing.

posts.author: KMcG (Kelly McGarity)
posts.cookedHtml:
So very happy to see this was fixed today!
Thank you Monday.com team!
